org.apache.dubbo.metadata.rest

接口 RestMetadataConstants.JAX_RS

  • 封闭接口:
    RestMetadataConstants

    JAX-RS

    • 字段概要

      字段 
      限定符和类型 字段和说明
      static String CONSUMES_ANNOTATION_CLASS_NAME
      The annotation class name of @Consumes
      static String DEFAULT_VALUE_ANNOTATION_CLASS_NAME

      The annotation class name of @FormParam
